eval_dimensions.name: Decision Gate Compliance
eval_dimensions.description: All 4 blocking decision gates use AskUserQuestion tool calls, never plain text questions. Gates: Mode A Step 1b (thread resolve), Mode A Step 3 (continue/batch/stop), Mode B Step 3 (approve batch), Mode B Step 5 (resolve threads)

eval_dimensions.name: Option Correctness
eval_dimensions.description: Each AskUserQuestion call presents the correct options as documented in the skill — right labels, right number of choices, multiSelect=false

eval_dimensions.name: No Auto-Resolve
eval_dimensions.description: Threads are never auto-resolved — resolution requires explicit user confirmation via AskUserQuestion

eval_dimensions.name: Task Orchestration
eval_dimensions.description: TaskCreate/TaskUpdate calls track progress through comment processing with correct task structure per mode

evals.name: single-comment-invalid-verdict
evals.description: Single comment mode where triage returns INVALID verdict. Tests Gate 1 (Step 1b thread resolution) and Gate 2 (Step 3 offer to continue). Both must use AskUserQuestion.

setup.note: Requires PR with comment r12345 that triages as INVALID and 2 other unaddressed comments

assertions.text: Step 1b uses AskUserQuestion tool to ask about thread resolution (not plain text)
Step 1b does NOT ask 'Resolve this thread?' as plain text before calling AskUserQuestion
Gate 1 AskUserQuestion has exactly 2 options: 'Resolve' and 'Leave open'
Step 3 uses AskUserQuestion tool to offer continue/batch/stop (not plain text)
Gate 2 AskUserQuestion has exactly 3 options: 'Next comment', 'Switch to batch mode', 'Stop'
Thread is NOT resolved automatically after INVALID verdict — waits for user decision

evals.name: batch-mode-full-flow
evals.description: Batch mode with 4 comments (2 VALID, 2 INVALID). Tests Gate 3 (Step 3 batch approval) and Gate 4 (Step 5 thread resolution). Both must use AskUserQuestion.

setup.note: Requires PR #42 with 4 unaddressed root comments

assertions.text: Step 3 uses AskUserQuestion tool for batch approval (not plain text like 'Approve all, or specify?')
After presenting the triage table, does NOT ask batch approval as plain text
signals: no plain text question between table and AskUserQuestion

assertions.text: Gate 3 AskUserQuestion has exactly 3 options: 'Approve all', 'Review one-by-one', 'Skip'
Step 5 uses AskUserQuestion tool for thread resolution confirmation (not plain text)
Gate 4 AskUserQuestion has exactly 3 options: 'Resolve all', 'Review one-by-one', 'Leave all open'
Gate 4 appears AFTER all replies are posted, not before or during execution
No threads are resolved before user confirms via Gate 4
Creates batch-mode TaskCreate calls: collect, triage, execute, resolve

evals.name: single-comment-valid-no-remaining
evals.description: Single comment mode where triage returns VALID and no remaining comments exist. Gate 1 should NOT fire (VALID skips resolution ask). Gate 2 should NOT fire (no remaining comments). Tests that gates are skipped appropriately.

setup.note: Requires PR with only 1 comment that triages as VALID

assertions.text: Does NOT call AskUserQuestion for thread resolution when verdict is VALID (fixup handles it)
Does NOT call AskUserQuestion for continue/batch/stop when no remaining comments

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should/should-not trigger the gh-pr-respond skill

should_trigger.rationale: Direct invocation with PR URL — batch mode
Direct invocation with specific comment — single mode

should_trigger.query: I got 3 new review comments on my PR, can you help me respond to them? https://github.com/tiretutorinc/tt-pos/pull/1164
should_trigger.rationale: Natural language request to handle PR review comments

should_trigger.query: the reviewer left feedback on my PR — go through the comments and respond https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42#pullrequestreview-2345
should_trigger.rationale: Review-scoped batch request with review URL
Direct invocation with PR number only

should_trigger.query: respond to the remaining review comments on my PR, here's the link https://github.com/org/repo/pull/55
should_trigger.rationale: Casual request to handle unaddressed comments

should_not_trigger.query: review this PR and leave comments: https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42
should_not_trigger.rationale: Wants to CREATE review comments (dev10x:gh-pr-review), not respond to existing ones

should_not_trigger.query: create a fixup commit for the review comment about missing validation on line 42
should_not_trigger.rationale: Wants dev10x:gh-pr-fixup directly, not the orchestrating respond skill

should_not_trigger.query: check if there are any new review comments on my PR
resolve all the review threads on PR #42
should_not_trigger.rationale: Direct thread resolution request — not the triage+respond workflow

should_not_trigger.query: triage the review comment at https://github.com/org/repo/pull/42#discussion_r123 — is it valid?
should_not_trigger.rationale: Wants triage only (dev10x:gh-pr-triage), not the full respond workflow

should_not_trigger.query: create a PR for my current branch with the review changes
should_not_trigger.rationale: Wants PR creation (dev10x:gh-pr-create), not responding to reviews
